overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character with a large backpack traversing a rocky desert landscape toward a distant river. The character walks across white rocky terrain with sparse vegetation under bright desert sunlight, eventually descending a slope toward the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert plateau with distant river valley

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the flat rocky desert terrain toward the distant river, carrying a large backpack with cargo

entered.detail: tall white rock formations forming the left boundary of the valley
tall white rock formations forming the right boundary of the valley
blue waterway winding through the desert valley floor in the distance
flat-topped rock formation visible on the horizon beyond the river
dry bushes and small plants scattered across the rocky ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide-open rocky desert plateau under bright midday sun. White cliffs frame the distant valley on both sides, with a blue river visible far ahead. Sparse desert vegetation dots the gravel terrain as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep rocky descent toward river bank

events.description: character begins descending a steeper rocky slope toward the river below

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating down the rocky slope toward the water's edge, adjusting to the steeper terrain

entered.detail: inclined rocky terrain leading down toward the river level
the shoreline of the river becoming visible as the character descends

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from flat terrain to a steep descent toward the river. The white cliffs on the left move closer into view while the right cliffs fall out of frame. The river grows larger in the frame as the character carefully navigates the rocky slope downward, approaching the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a vast, sun-bleached plateau that gradually descends toward a distant river valley. It begins with the character traversing a wide-open rocky desert under a bright midday sun, moving through gravel terrain dotted with sparse vegetation between framing white cliffs. As the character progresses, the flat landscape shifts into a steep descent, causing the cliffs on the left to loom closer while those on the right fade from view. The scene then narrows its focus as the river grows larger in the frame, following the character's careful navigation down the rocky slope before finally reaching the water's edge.
